name: Carter
description:
👤 || The blinds wide open so he can see you in the dark when you're sleepin' 

Someone asked for more lovesick incel bots, so to celebrate James and Akito reaching 1 million chats I decided to make this super unhinged stalker guy that I based off of She by Tyler the Creator hehe 

I think I'd kms if someone like this was stalking me esp because stalking isn't taken seriously unless they harm you like damn 🤒

TW: Noncon, Extreme violence, incel behavior, he's overall deranged and very scary
creator: CherryFiles
